channel.title: Luzerge Blog
channel.description: Website monitoring, CDN management, and web security tips for Philippine businesses.

item.title: Why Website Security Starts with Monitoring
item.description: Most cyberattacks succeed because the target didn't know they were vulnerable. Uptime monitoring, DDoS protection, and SSL management form the first line of defense for any website.

item.title: Setting Up Cloudflare for Your Philippine Business
item.description: A step-by-step guide to moving your domain to Cloudflare, configuring DNS, enabling caching, and getting free SSL. Designed for Filipino SME owners.

item.title: Understanding CDN Cache Hit Rates
item.description: What is a cache hit rate, why does it matter, and how can you improve it? We break down Cloudflare's caching system for faster load times.

item.title: Introducing Luzerge: Website Monitoring for Philippine SMEs
item.description: We built Luzerge because Philippine businesses deserve affordable, easy-to-use website monitoring. Learn about our mission and what we offer.
